title: Sector Rotation as a Source of Alpha: Academic & Practitioner Evidence
author: IOWN Research
summary: Comprehensive review of academic and practitioner evidence on sector rotation alpha. Covers business cycle rotation, momentum-based approaches, monetary policy signals, and valuation-driven frameworks with quantified return estimates.

title: Welcome to IOWN Research
author: IOWN Research
summary: An introduction to the IOWN Research section — what to expect and how reports are organized.
